{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged madra
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Forged madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Forged]] [[madra]] is a specialized state of energy achieved when a practitioner uses techniques to condense, shape, or solidify their [[madra]] into tangible structures. This process can result in a wide variety of forms, ranging from simple tools like needles, scales, and discs to complex constructs such as weapons, armor, shields, limbs, or even massive stone giants. The stability and physical properties of these creations vary significantly based on the skill of the user and the specific type of [[madra]] involved; some [[Forged]] structures are incredibly dense and feel like [[steel]], while others are fragile as glass or dissipate shortly after being formed. Advanced practitioners and [[Soulsmiths]] can use [[Forging]] to create intricate items, such as Divine Treasures or specialized clothing, often utilizing [[scripts]] and bindings to maintain the integrity of the constructs. [[Forging]] can also be used as a combat technique, allowing users to manifest temporary attacks like extra blades, claws, or projectiles. While some [[Forged]] [[madra]] is created through intentional technique, it can also be found naturally in the remnants of powerful beings or used to power complex machinery like cloudships. The process of [[Forging]] can be physically demanding, potentially straining a user's madra channels if done excessively or without sufficient stability.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forged]] [[madra]] is a substance capable of forming dense structures comparable to [[steel]]. During an encounter, [[Yerin]] successfully deflected a spike made of this material. It is also known that the [[madra]] can be utilized to [[construct]] extremely stable barriers. A [[Soulsmith]] must distinguish between the handling of forged [[madra]] and [[dead matter]]. Additionally, a shining bar of this substance was discovered within a wardrobe.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forged madra]] can form dense structures like [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] deflected a spike of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forged madra]] can be used to create extremely stable barriers.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forged madra]] and [[dead matter]] must be handled differently by a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A shining bar of [[Forged madra]] was found in a wardrobe.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged]] [[madra]] is a substance that can manifest in various physical forms, including liquid, sludge, pebbles, or glass-like shards. This [[madra]] consists of seven basic aspects and combinations that can result in a chaotic blend of colors. It possesses a distinct destruction aura and is capable of being utilized to [[construct]] mechanical limbs.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged madra]] can be used to create mechanical limbs.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged madra]] can be a chaotic blend of colors.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged madra]] has seven basic aspects and combinations.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged madra]] can exist in different forms such as liquid, sludge, pebbles, or glass-like shards.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Forged madra]] has a destruction aura.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The walls of [[Akura clan territory]] are made of black [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|He caught a glimpse of the glowing mass of [[Forged madra]] at the heart of the cloud [[construct]] before it dissipated into [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] uses dark green [[Forged madra]] to create a tent.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] has [[Forged madra]] limbs.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The tent's dark green madra is [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] has purple spider-legs made of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[King Dakata]] uses [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] can manifest blue-white stars of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Forged madra]] can be used to sheath [[Wavedancer]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forged madra]] exists in the form of stars floating in the [[Twilight Room]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blacksword]] uses [[Forged madra]] in his attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]]'s first [[Divine Treasure]] produces a white eye of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A majestic golden serpent crafted from powerful [[madra]] whipped up a sandstorm of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Forged]] [[madra]] can be compressed within a pouch made of scripted purple cloth. This substance is utilized in the construction of barriers, such as those seen in Heaven’s Glory, and can be shaped into transparent, glass-like panes. When these panes are shattered, they burn with the intensity of live coals. Additionally, a brick composed of brown [[Forged]] [[madra]] has served as a weapon, and the light emitted from [[Samara's ring]] is also composed of this [[madra]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The pouch of scripted purple cloth compresses [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Heaven’s Glory barrier was partially made of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Forged madra]] can be used to create transparent panes of glass-like coverings.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Forged madra]] panes burn like live coals when broken.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A brick of brown [[Forged madra]] was used as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The light of [[Samara's ring]] was [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Forged madra]] can manifest as strands that web up a room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Forged madra]] is present below [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Forged madra]] can be used to create hands.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged madra]] can be used to generate crystalline walls.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged madra]] can be used to create temporary shelters.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s hand was gloved in [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin]] suspected the ice produced in the bowl was [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Forged madra]] supports civilizations within the trees of the Forest Monarch's territory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Forged madra]] was not used in the construction of the primitive castles.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
